shots.sequence_action: Han Chinese army marching through deep snow storm
shots.visual_description: A close-up of an ancient Han Dynasty general's face covered in snow, looking desperately forward as wind howls, his horse taking a heavy step forward in the deep snow.
shots.notes: HMI-01: 疑问句开头。HMI-02: 视觉锚点对齐'将军'
shots.image_gen_prompt: Ancient civilization era with culturally consistent characters and period-accurate costumes; Han Dynasty for Chinese segments with fully Asian East Asian Chinese soldiers; authentic period armor and weapons. Close-up of a Han Dynasty general on horseback, heavy snow storm, horse leg actively stepping into deep snow, face showing desperation, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, 8k. NEG: latin letters, english characters, download button, click here, static pose, frozen subject, modern clothing.
